raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "Front side of box_1 is directly accessible; there is at least 35 cm of free frontal clearance on the tabletop so both end-effectors can approach simultaneously without colliding with the cup or box_2. The robot is positioned facing the table, and its arms are within reach of the front face of box_1.",
    "Postcondition": "Both end-effectors firmly hold box_1 at its lower front corners, lifting it a few centimeters so the box is no longer resting on the tabletop. The darker box is now securely picked up by the robot."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Front side of box_1 is directly accessible; there is at least 35 cm of free frontal clearance on the tabletop so both end-effectors can approach simultaneously without colliding with the cup or box_2. The robot is positioned facing the table, and its arms are within reach of the front face of box_1.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Both end-effectors firmly hold box_1 at its lower front corners, lifting it a few centimeters so the box is no longer resting on the tabletop. The darker box is now securely picked up by the robot.
